primary_text:
2,000+ families already order from FarmThru every week. Now we're opening investment to the community.

Equity crowdfunding on Birchal. July 2026. From $50, capped at $10,000 per investor.

This is the first time our customers can become our owners. 50+ regenerative farms. Zero middlemen. Food that's days old, not weeks.

$5 refundable deposit secures VIP access and priority when the campaign goes live.

Not financial advice. Read the disclosure document on Birchal.
headline: From Customer to Owner
description: 2,000+ families already buy from us. Now you can invest. Birchal, July 2026. From $50.
creative_brief: Lead with existing traction as social proof, then create urgency through the transition from customer base to investor opportunity. 'Customer to owner' reframe is powerful for community-backed brands. Compliance woven in naturally.
